case_title: PACIFIC EMPLOYERS'ACE USA INSURANCE COMPANIES VS. CALIFORNIA INSURANCE GUARANTE ASSOCIATION ON et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF CASSIDY E. CHIVERS IN SUPPORT OF OPPOSITION TO EXPARTE APPLICATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF PACIFIC EMPLOYERS'ACE USA INSURANCE COMPANIES
ORDER RE CALIFORNIA INSURANCE GUARANTEE ASSOCIATION'S EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER VOIDING FILING DUE TO NONPAYMENT OF PARTIAL PAYMENT

LAW AND MOTION 301, AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA INSURANCE GUARANTEE ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF'S DISPUTE WITH CIGA WAS TENDERED TO AND RESOLVED BY THE WCAB. THIS COURT CANNOT CORRECT, REVIEW OR ANNUL THE WCAB'S DETERMINATION THAT PLAINTIFF IS RESPONSIBLE TO THE INSURED AND THAT THEREFORE, CIGA IS NOT "OTHER INSURANCE" BY SECTION CODE 1063.1(C)(9). PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN NO REASONABLE POSSIBILITY IT COULD AMEND ITS COMPLAINT TO AVOID THIS RESULT. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL A. KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-28-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Christina Lee, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Pacific Employers' Ace USA Insurance Companies.
Danielle Wong, Supervisor for plaintiff, was placed under oath but did not testify.
No appearance by defendant Golden West Food Corporation.
Order sustaining without leave to amend defendant California Insurance Guarantee Association's demurrer to the complaint was filed on October 7, 2008.
Default was entered against defendant Golden West Food Corporation on April 16, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed on June 26, 2009.

At the request of counsel for plaintiff, this matter is taken OFF CALENDAR.

THE MATTER WAS ARGUED. AFTER THE ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA INSURANCE GUARANTEE ASSOCIATION'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF'S DISPUTE WITH CIGA WAS TENDERED TO AND RESOLVED BY THE WCAB. THIS COURT CANNOT CORRECT, REVIEW OR ANNUL THE WCAB'S DETERMINATION THAT PLAINTIFF IS RESPONSIBLE TO THE INSURED AND THAT THEREFORE, CIGA IS NOT "OTHER INSURANCE" BY SECTION CODE 1063.1(C)(9). PLAINTIFF HAS SHOWN NO REASONABLE POSSIBILITY IT COULD AMEND ITS COMPLAINT TO AVOID THIS RESULT. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol A. Karen, CSR # 8189 301/PJB/BD
